request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Important Security Insight 🚨 As a former NATO strategist, I've seen firsthand how our alliances keep us safe. Critics say we're overcommitted, but the truth is: our partnerships are our best deterrent. When allies share the burden, we're all stronger. Don't let short-term thinking weaken our long-term security. #StrongerTogether #NationalSecurity
